---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement to firmware, docs, or data acquisition
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Goal

What should the project support?

## Use Case

Describe the hardware setup and why this feature helps.

## Safety Impact

Could this affect balancing outputs, safety checks, or wiring assumptions?

## Proposed Approach

Describe the change if you have one.

## Validation Plan

How should the change be tested?
